title: Scalar release notes

version.description: Semver-style version string for the release (for example `3.5.1`).

title.description: Short, sentence-case headline summarizing the release.

content.description: Body copy and rich blocks after the headline: `paragraph` for intro text, `list` for bullet highlights, then headings, media, and optional `href` blocks (for example full release notes).

type.description: Discriminator for the paragraph block type.

text.description: Plain-text paragraph copy. Use multiple paragraph blocks for multi-paragraph notes.

oneOf.description: A free-form paragraph rendered between other content blocks.

type.description: Discriminator for the heading block type.

text.description: Subsection heading shown inside the release entry.

level.description: Heading level. Defaults to 3 (rendered below the release title).

oneOf.description: A subsection heading inside a release entry.

type.description: Discriminator for the list block type.

items.description: Bullet items rendered as a list. Keep each item to a single sentence.

ordered.description: Render as a numbered list when `true`. Defaults to a bullet list.

oneOf.description: A bullet (or numbered) list of single-sentence items.

type.description: Discriminator for the image block type.

src.description: Absolute URL of the image asset.

alt.description: Accessibility text. Required - describe what the image shows.

caption.description: Optional caption rendered beneath the image.

width.description: Optional natural width of the image in pixels. Helps the layout reserve space before the image loads.

height.description: Optional natural height of the image in pixels. Helps the layout reserve space before the image loads.

oneOf.description: An inline image. Provide alt text for accessibility and an optional caption rendered beneath.

type.description: Discriminator for the video block type.

src.description: Absolute URL of an MP4/WebM video asset (self-hosted works best).

poster.description: Optional URL of a poster image shown before the video starts playing.

caption.description: Optional caption rendered beneath the video.

autoplay.description: When `true`, the video starts playing as soon as it is rendered. Pair with `muted: true`.

loop.description: When `true`, the video loops back to the start when it ends.

muted.description: When `true`, the video is muted. Required for autoplay to work in modern browsers.

controls.description: When `true`, native playback controls are shown. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

oneOf.description: An inline video clip. Self-hosted MP4/WebM URLs work best - autoplay clips should also set `muted: true`.

type.description: Discriminator for an outbound URL block.

href.description: Destination URL (opened in a new tab).

label.description: Accessible link text (for example "Read full release notes").

oneOf.description: Call-to-action link (for example to full release notes on GitHub).

items.description: Rich content block rendered inside a release note (paragraph, heading, list, image, video, or href).
A single curated release note rendered in the "What's new" modal.

description: Curated, user-facing release notes for the Scalar app. Newest entry first.
